import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create payment intent"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/payment-intents"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



    Create a new payment intent for the Account.

    Supports idempotent creation via the `IDEMPOTENCY-KEY` request header. Duplicate requests
    with the same key return the original payment intent.

    ### Permissions
    * `payment:write`

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
